stimuli.description: Five-letter flanker array where the flanking letters match the central target letter (e.g. FFFFF or HHHHH).

detection.selector: (() => { const m=document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img'); const f=document.querySelector('.flankerLeft_2 img'); if(!m||!f) return false; const mc=(m.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; const fc=(f.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; return mc===fc; })()

response.response_key_js: (() => { const m=document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img'); if(!m) return null; const center=(m.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; const g=(window.efVars && typeof window.efVars.group_index==='number')?window.efVars.group_index:1; const isLowGroup=(g>=0 && g<=4); if(center==='H') return isLowGroup?',':'.'; return isLowGroup?'.':','; })()

stimuli.description: Five-letter flanker array where the flanking letters differ from the central target letter (e.g. FFHFF or HHFHH).

detection.selector: (() => { const m=document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img'); const f=document.querySelector('.flankerLeft_2 img'); if(!m||!f) return false; const mc=(m.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; const fc=(f.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; return mc!==fc; })()

response.response_key_js: (() => { const m=document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img'); if(!m) return null; const center=(m.src||'').includes('H.png')?'H':'F'; const g=(window.efVars && typeof window.efVars.group_index==='number')?window.efVars.group_index:1; const isLowGroup=(g>=0 && g<=4); if(center==='H') return isLowGroup?',':'.'; return isLowGroup?'.':','; })()

phase_detection.feedback: (() => { const t = (document.body.innerText||''); return /read your feedback|blocks of trials|begin practice|test portion|Done with this task|Thanks for completing/i.test(t) && document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img') === null; })()

timing.trial_context_js: (() => { const m=document.querySelector('.flankerMiddle img'); if(!m) return ''; return (m.src||'').includes('H.png')?'center:H':'center:F'; })()

attention_check.response_js: (() => { const el=document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus'); if(!el) return null; const t=(el.textContent||'').toLowerCase(); let m=t.match(/press the ([a-z]) key/); if(m) return m[1]; const ord={first:1,second:2,third:3}; m=t.match(/(first|second|third) letter of the english alphabet/); if(m && !t.includes('to last')){ return String.fromCharCode(96+ord[m[1]]); } if(t.includes('third to last')) return 'x'; if(t.includes('second to last')) return 'y'; if(t.includes('last letter')) return 'z'; return null; })()

counterbalancing.note: getKeyMappingForTask: group_index 0-4 maps center letter H -> comma (','), center letter F -> period ('.'); group_index 5-14 reverses this (H -> '.', F -> ','). The correct key is therefore counterbalanced per participant and is computed in response_key_js from the DOM center-letter image plus group_index.
counterbalancing.cdp_dwell_derivation: min response window = 1500 ms (stimulus trial_duration, response_ends_trial=false). 1500 * 0.15 = 225 ms (>= 50 ms floor).

reasoning_chain.inference: Identified paradigm 'flanker_rdoc' with 2 stimuli. Source files: jquery.min.js, bootstrap.min.js, math.min.js, jspsych.js, plugin-instructions.js, plugin-html-keyboard-response.js, plugin-html-button-response.js, plugin-survey-text.js, plugin-fullscreen.js, plugin-.
Pilot passed first attempt: 25 trials, conditions ['congruent', 'incongruent'] all observed.
